projectDescription: Comprehensive NBA statistics aggregation platform collecting player, team, and game data from multiple sources across seasons 2014-2025.
keyFeatures: Multi-source NBA data aggregation from Basketball Reference, NBA.com, and pbpstats
Historical data from 2014-2025 seasons (regular season and playoffs)
Comprehensive player statistics including shooting, defense, hustle, and tracking metrics
Automated data collection and processing pipeline
publicApiSurface: make_index.py - Player index and scoring data generation
defense.py - Defensive metrics collection (rim protection, opponent FG%)
player_shooting.py - Shot quality analysis by defender distance
hustle.py - Hustle stats (deflections, loose balls, screens, box outs)
new_tracking.py - Player tracking and movement data
dribble.py - Dribble and shot creation metrics
contract_data.py - NBA salary and contract information
